text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature hasn't shown up for training.
Worried, I go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! I know it happens every time, but I can't
wait for that catchphrase!

text_block_list.name: Appliance Store Owner
text_block_list.text: You know it, Natie! That's the best part of The C-Team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find Nice Nature intently watching a show on a
display TV at the appliance store.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh! There's the van! Here it comes! Is he gonna
take out his ciga—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wha—Trainer! What are you doing here?
choice_data_list:
...I pity the fool who's not wearing their
tracksuit!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that sounds like something they would say
in the show. But why are you talking about
track...suits...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: R-roger that! I'll do better from now on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I love it when a plan comes together! ...Next time,
hopefully.
